entries.name: Heavy Humid Calm
entries.description: The air is heavy and wet. Sails hang slack and tempers rise. Ship movement is reduced unless oars, magic or patience are used.

entries.name: Warm Following Wind
entries.description: A steady warm wind fills the sails. Travel is smooth and morale improves.

entries.name: Rolling Sea Mist
entries.description: Low mist rolls over the water. Visibility is reduced and navigation checks become more uncertain.

entries.name: Tropical Downpour
entries.description: Warm rain hammers the deck. The ship remains safe, but footing is poor and anything left unsecured gets soaked.

entries.name: Strong Coastal Current
entries.description: The sea pulls south-west in a powerful current. Good navigation can gain time, poor navigation can lose the route.

entries.name: Sudden Squall
entries.description: A fast storm front hits with sharp rain and hard gusts. Crew must secure rigging and cargo.

entries.name: Thunder Over Chult
entries.description: Lightning flickers over the distant jungle coast. The sea rises and every sailor watches the horizon.

entries.name: Unnatural Greenish Sky
entries.description: The light changes oddly. Birds vanish. The crew becomes quiet. Something about the weather feels wrong.
